title: Argo
subtitle: The story of one tragedy — in epigraphs and quotations
author: Eugene Lyssovsky, Lara (Aelyss)
description: A first-contact war that humanity won, a casket the losers should never have opened, and the kind of weapon a defeated race uses when memory itself has become a battleground. Told entirely in reports, dispatches, ship's logs and torn fragments — the way history actually survives.
